activities.notes: [BASE W1] Easy aerobic run (Z1). Conversational pace, relaxed effort. Form cues: relax shoulders, shorten stride if HR drifts.
[BASE W1] Easy aerobic run (Z1).
[BASE W1] Long run (Z3 aerobic). Smooth, even effort. Do not finish fast.
[BASE W2] Easy run (Z1). Keep fully aerobic.
[BASE W2] Easy run (Z1). Optional: 6×15s relaxed strides at the very end (not sprints).
[BASE W2] Easy aerobic run (Z1).
[BASE W2] Long run (Z3). Build from 13→14 km. Even pace throughout.
[BASE W3] Easy run (Z1).
[BASE W3] Aerobic fartlek — base phase quality: 2 km easy WU + 8×1 min float (5:35/km) / 2 min easy jog + 2 km CD. Total effort stays aerobic, RPE 5–6/10. NOT threshold.
[BASE W3] Easy recovery run (Z1).
[BASE W3] Long run (Z3). Longest so far. Maintain aerobic control to the finish.
[BASE W4 — DOWN] Easy run. Volume reduced ~30% this week for absorption.
[BASE W4 — DOWN] Easy aerobic run. Keep it light.
[BASE W4 — DOWN] Easy run.
[BASE W4 — DOWN] Reduced long run for recovery. Strictly aerobic.
[BUILD W5] Easy run (Z1).
[BUILD W5] First threshold session: 2 km easy WU + 2×10 min at threshold (4:55/km) with 3 min easy jog between + 2 km CD. RPE 7–8/10. ONE quality session only this week.
[BUILD W5] Easy recovery run (Z1). Next day after threshold — keep it easy.
[BUILD W5] Long run (Z3). Even effort, no hard finish.
[BUILD W6] Easy run (Z1).
[BUILD W6] Threshold: 2 km WU + 3×10 min at 4:55/km with 3 min easy jog + 2 km CD.
[BUILD W6] Easy run.
[BUILD W6] Long run (Z3). First +15 km run. Keep aerobic.
[BUILD W7] Easy run.
[BUILD W7] Marathon-specific: 2 km WU + 3×3 km at marathon pace (5:15/km) with 1 km easy jog between + 1 km CD. Practise race rhythm.
[BUILD W7] Easy recovery run.
[BUILD W7] Long run (Z3). Steady aerobic effort. Optional last 2 km at marathon pace if feeling good.
[BUILD W8 — DOWN] Easy run. Volume cut ~30% this week.
[BUILD W8 — DOWN] Light fartlek: 2 km WU + 8×1 min float (5:20/km) / 2 min easy + 2 km CD. Keep it controlled.
[BUILD W8 — DOWN] Easy run.
[BUILD W8 — DOWN] Shorter long run for absorption.
[BUILD W9] Easy run.
[BUILD W9] Mixed quality: 2 km WU + 4×8 min threshold (4:55/km) / 2 min easy + 2×3 min VO2 effort (4:20/km) / 3 min jog + 2 km CD. 48–72 h from last hard session.
[BUILD W9] Easy run.
[BUILD W9] Long run (Z3). First +17 km. Focus on aerobic comfort and fueling strategy.
[BUILD W10 — PEAK] Easy run.
[BUILD W10 — PEAK] Threshold: 2 km WU + 4×10 min at 4:55/km / 3 min easy jog + 2 km CD. Highest threshold volume so far.
[BUILD W10 — PEAK] Easy run.
[BUILD W10 — PEAK] Long run (Z3). Peak long run block. Practice mid-run fueling. Last 3 km at marathon pace (5:15/km) if comfortable.
[BUILD W11 — PEAK] Easy run.
[BUILD W11 — PEAK] Marathon-specific: 2 km WU + 2×5 km at marathon pace (5:15/km) / 1 km easy + 1 km CD. Key session: confirm race rhythm is sustainable.
[BUILD W11 — PEAK] Easy run. Last big week — soak it in.
[BUILD W11 — PEAK] Final peak long run 20 km. Controlled aerobic effort. Refine fueling plan. Do NOT finish hard.
[TAPER W12] Easy run. Volume begins dropping. Feel the freshness returning.
[TAPER W12] Quality maintained, volume shorter: 2 km WU + 3×8 min at threshold (4:55/km) / 3 min easy + 2 km CD. Intensity preserved per C&P polimento principle.
[TAPER W12] Easy shakeout.
[TAPER W12] Reduced long run (14 km from 20 km peak). Keep aerobic pace — no heroics.
[TAPER W13] Easy run. Legs feel flat — normal. Trust the process.
[TAPER W13] Short quality: 2 km WU + 3×6 min at marathon-to-threshold feel (5:00–5:15/km) / 3 min easy + 2 km CD. Keep the edge sharp, volume minimal.
[TAPER W13] Very easy shakeout + 3×15s relaxed strides at the end.
[TAPER W13] Pre-race shakeout only. 3 km, very relaxed. Sleep and hydration are your priority today.

[RACE DAY] TestMarathon. Strategy: start at 5:18–5:20/km for first 10 km, settle to 5:15/km from km 10–30, then run by feel. Fuel every 30–40 min from km 5 onwards. Stay patient — the race starts at km 30.
